name: promote-memory
description: Memory promotion tool for Claude Code — upgrades errors.md and learnings.md entries to permanent memory

plugins.name: promote-memory
plugins.description: 1 command + 1 agent (/promote-memory). Scans project memory/errors.md and memory/learnings.md, promotes qualifying status:new entries to permanent memory (MEMORY.md or ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md). Supports dry-run and custom install target.
